response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive full-stack and software development experience, particularly in web, mobile, and desktop systems, but lacks direct experience in embedded firmware for LAN-switch products or security-focused networking technologies. His C/C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments, and there is no evidence of Japanese language proficiency or deep Linux kernel expertise.
strengths: Strong background in software development with 10+ years of experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, desktop, and embedded).
Proven ability to work with low-latency systems and high-performance databases (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic).
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and contributions to developer tooling.
concerns: No explicit experience with embedded firmware for LAN-switch products or security-focused networking technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X).
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency and limited evidence of Linux kernel source-code modification capability.
Most recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js, with minimal C programming experience in the last decade.
